judgeReasoning: Excellent single-session summary with clear topic separation and strong active/completed distinction. The [active-topic] section gives specific next steps ('follow past articulation into making') and the [pending-action] shows exactly where the agent was mid-task (about to spawn book-summarizer for Sartre). Only minor weakness: could be slightly more explicit about MoltCircle next steps (Discord account creation mentioned in Puppeteer section but not in MoltCircle section). Very easy to orient and continue work.
